title: Optimization+
body:
This is just a cool modpack that I thought I'd make that includes sodium and other proformance mods and QoL mods. It's mostly client side, but with the addition of worldedit and carpet mod.

**WARNINGS**
- I do not have an Nvidia GPU, so if there are problems with Nvidium, I would have no way of knowing (although I do have friends who have an Nvidia GPU).
- If you are editing this modpack on 1.20.1 and you get an error, it will say that FastLoad requires Minecraft version 1.18.2. Ignore this.
